text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that creates machines able to think and learn like humans. At its core, AI involves programming computers to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence, such as recognising speech or making decisions. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance by analysing data without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced method is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to process information in layers, much like the human brain. You already use AI daily—when your phone suggests the next word in a text, when a streaming service recommends a movie, or when a virtual assistant answers your questions.
